creator: olevole@olevole.ru
text:
脨聴脨麓脩聙脨掳脨虏脩聛脩聜脨虏脩聝脨鹿脩聜脨碌,

After spliting by update
20120116:
  AFFECTS: users of x11/xcb-util

libxcb-keysyms.so library produced by new port: x11/xcb-util-keysyms

--- vlc-orig/Makefile   2012-01-18 12:28:38.000000000 +0400
+++ vlc/Makefile        2012-01-18 12:29:14.000000000 +0400
@@ -22,7 +22,8 @@
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=   avcodec.1:${PORTSDIR}/multimedia/ffmpeg \
                gcrypt.18:${PORTSDIR}/security/libgcrypt \
-               proxy.1:${PORTSDIR}/net/libproxy
+               proxy.1:${PORTSDIR}/net/libproxy \
+               xcb-keysyms:${PORTSDIR}/x11/xcb-util-keysyms
 
 OPTIONS=       A52 "A52 DVD audio decoder" On \
                AALIB "Aalib Console Graphics Support" Off \


-- 
脨隆 脩聝脨虏脨掳脨露脨碌脨陆脨赂脨碌脨录, With respect,
